name: workflow
description: Task-board work framework for hobby/solo repos: groom, work, batch-work, acceptance-verifier gate, decision log, cross-repo status, plus framework-init scaffolding and framework-check validation/migration. Tasks are files in workflow/<status>/ folders (folder = status, moves are git mv), board view via a shipped ./workflow/status script, repo specifics in a workflow/AGENTS.md contract
